programs.name: SNAP (New York)
programs.full_name: Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program — New York
programs.description: New York administers federal SNAP. Apply online at myBenefits.ny.gov.

application.where: myBenefits.ny.gov or local Department of Social Services

programs.name: New York Medicaid
programs.description: New York has among the most generous Medicaid programs in the US. Adults covered up to 138% FPL. Essential Plan available up to 200% FPL.

monthly_benefit_range.note: No premium for most. Essential Plan has $0-$20/month premium for 139-200% FPL.

income.note: New York also has the Essential Plan (139-200% FPL) and Child Health Plus (CHIP) up to 400% FPL

application.where: nystateofhealth.ny.gov or local Department of Social Services
